title: An Act relative to noncompetition agreements in the Commonwealth

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Gordon of Bedford, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 2118) of Kenneth I. Gordon for legislation to ban noncompetition agreements in the Commonwealth.  Labor and Workforce Development.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Labor and Workforce Development

related_entities.name: committee on Labor and Workforce Development

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 11/17/2025 from 11:00 AM-02:00 PM in B-1
